_comment: Copy to .accounts.local.json (gitignored) and fill in REAL values. Never commit the filled copy. See tests/playwright/README.md. network 'alpha' = the LIVE Aztec mainnet (prod) — real funds, real fees. No password/passkey needed: the test sets its own password when importing the phrase.
_mode_same_wallet: Provide ONLY 'a' (one phrase) + 'token' + 'accounts' (two addresses from that seed) → transfers between those two accounts.
_mode_two_wallets: Instead add 'b' with a DIFFERENT phrase → transfers between two separate wallets.

a.mnemonic: word1 word2 word3 word4 word5 word6 word7 word8 word9 word10 word11 word12
